strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq with MCP frameworks
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
concerns: No explicit evidence of cloud AI platform strategy or director-level product leadership
Master's/PhD in AI-related field lacking; education limited to BS in CS
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting customer-facing roles in Berlin
response.justification: Bogdan has deep, hands-on engineering experience across AI-agent systems, cloud infrastructure, and open-source platform building — aligning strongly with technical requirements. However, he lacks formal AI education and demonstrable director-level strategic influence in cloud AI product strategy, which are critical for this role. His entrepreneurial initiative and technical breadth are impressive but don't fully compensate for the absence of strategic leadership evidence.
